spec.name: The First-Aid Station
spec.description: This is the place to come to if one is overcome by the heat and gore. (Or if a lion gets loose) You see a jar of live leeches and other barbaric medical apparati lying about here. From the west comes the roar of the crowd, and a hall leads east. The healer will be with you shortly.

east.description: You see hundreds, perhaps thousands of people.

west.description: Rows of stone bleachers lie to the west.

extra_descs.description: DISGUSTING! Each is about the size of matchbox and very slimy. You are VERY glad that you have access to a cleric!
